title: EMM 同步
visualBaseline: pending: legacy 1920x1080 characterization has not been generated
completionRule: Complete only when the wrapper AST and its delegated legacy EmmSync component have a complete reviewed inventory and scripted characterization; the external EMM source boundary, connection and matching states, refresh, errors and lifecycle are covered; and either legacy scan/write/skip/progress/cancel/conflict behavior is restored through canonical services or its removal is explicitly accepted as a replacement contract. The present connection-status Card remains partial.

unsupportedNodes.replacement: The generated wrapper prototype freezes only delegation to $lib/components/panels/emm/EmmSyncCard.svelte; that child must be separately inventoried before legacy sync behavior can be marked complete.
XR reads the existing external EMM database through process-side read-only stores and authenticated Reader DTOs; no browser SQLite access or copy into thumbnails.db is allowed.

sourceUiInventory.title: 旧 Card 委托边界
acceptanceItems: 属性 Card 只委托给 EmmSync 子组件
子组件 DOM、控件和状态必须另行冻结
Card 保持 properties Panel shell 行为

sourceUiInventory.title: 外部 EMM 数据源状态
acceptanceItems: 自动发现默认 EMM database.sqlite
支持显式数据库路径
显示外部源可用或当前书籍未匹配
数据库失败不伪装为无记录
外部数据库保持只读

sourceUiInventory.title: 旧扫描和写入进度
acceptanceItems: 选择当前书籍或目录同步范围
显示扫描数量
显示匹配数量
显示写入数量
显示跳过数量
显示错误数量和详细错误
显示运行中和完成状态

sourceUiInventory.title: 执行、取消、重试和冲突策略
acceptanceItems: 开始同步命令
运行中禁用重复开始
取消进行中的同步
失败后重试
选择或显示冲突策略
重新读取当前实时外部投影

sourceUiInventory.title: 加载、错误、隐藏和 Card shell
acceptanceItems: 未打开书籍显示独立空态
检查数据源时显示 loading
失败显示 alert 和重试
隐藏或卸载取消请求
独立 lazy Card 在窄宽度无溢出
实时读取说明不暗示已写入 thumbnails.db

items.title: 冻结委托子组件的完整逐控件清单
items.targetContract: Extend the reproducible AST review beyond the one-line wrapper so every delegated sync control, conditional block, event and unsupported node is frozen before full migration claims.
items.notes: The current generated prototype records only the wrapper import and is insufficient evidence for the delegated legacy UI.

items.title: 实时外部 EMM 只读数据源
items.targetContract: Discover or explicitly configure the existing EMM database.sqlite, read Mangas rows by normalized source path in read-only mode and merge missing values behind the canonical Reader metadata service without copying them into thumbnails.db.
items.notes: The external EMM database is a foreign read-only source. thumbnails.db remains the NeoView compatibility store, xr overrides keep precedence, and xiranite.db receives no Reader business tables.

items.title: 重新读取当前书籍投影
items.targetContract: Explicitly invalidate the current static metadata request and re-read the external projection with loading, error and duplicate-action protection.
items.notes: A reread button exists, but focused duplicate-click and failed refresh coverage is missing.

items.title: 扫描、匹配、写入、跳过和进度
items.targetContract: If retained, execute current-book or directory synchronization through a bounded canonical service and expose scan, match, write, skip, error and completion progress without browser-owned database access.
items.notes: The current Card does not perform a legacy synchronization job. This item may be removed only by an explicitly accepted replacement decision.

items.title: 取消、重试和冲突策略
items.targetContract: A retained write operation must support cancellation, recoverable retry and a documented conflict policy while leaving the external EMM database and old NeoView tables unmodified.
items.notes: No sync job currently exists, so job cancellation and conflicts remain unresolved rather than silently not-applicable.

items.title: 未打开、检查中、未匹配、已连接和错误
items.targetContract: Distinguish no active book, source check, matched record, unmatched record, source unavailable and recoverable transport failure without presenting an empty projection as successful synchronization.
items.notes: Matched and common error/loading states exist; source-unavailable versus unmatched diagnostics are not yet independently represented.

items.title: 静态元数据共享与隐藏取消
items.targetContract: Share one static metadata request with sibling consumers, perform zero work while inactive and cancel or ignore stale completion on deactivation, session replacement and unmount.
items.notes: The current test proves hidden zero work and request sharing with Raw Data; explicit session replacement remains.

items.title: 旧同步层级与响应式几何
items.targetContract: Preserve the source sync hierarchy, status language, progress and command density at desktop and constrained widths, or document the accepted status-only replacement against a legacy screenshot.
items.notes: Target desktop and 420px geometry exists, but the old delegated component is not characterized and its progress UI is absent.

items.title: 记录实时读取替代预同步缓存
items.targetContract: Document that XR resolves current EMM fields directly from the external read-only database and therefore does not require a preliminary copy into thumbnails.db, while separately deciding the fate of legacy explicit batch-sync commands.
items.notes: Realtime read is implemented and non-destructive. Removal of legacy job controls is recorded but not yet treated as an accepted complete migration.
